summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Argent Focused Small Cap ETF (ALIL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed, narrow selection of US small-cap stocks. The selection process is heavily based on fundamental research and weighted based on analyst conviction ALIL was launched on Apr 9, 2025 and is issued by Argent.

holdings.infoBox: ALIL is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Victory Capital Holdings stock at 4.86%, Enpro at 4.51%, RBC Bearings at 3.81%, ePlus inc. at 3.71%, and IES Holdings at 3.62%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
